condition: Severe shoulder injury (possibly rotator cuff tear or ligament damage)
pain_location: Front and outer part of shoulder (spreads down arm)
pain_nature: Sharp pain, deep throbbing ache, weakness, tingling sensation
previous_history: Mild strain due to physical activity (no significant previous history of shoulder injuries)
functional_limitations: Difficult to lift arm, raise it above or move shoulder in general
medical_history: No major medical conditions, overall health has been normal
red_flags: Large painful lump (8-9 inches), spreading sensation, numbness and tingling
treatments_taken: Anti-inflammatory medications, resting, doctor's visit without significant change
additional_notes: Suspected rotator cuff tear or ligament damage
